title: Call Function with Custom Context
titleCn: 使用自定义上下文调用函数

testcases.input: fn = function add(b) { return this.a + b; } args = [{"a": 5}, 7] Output: 12 Explanation: fn.callPolyfill({"a": 5}, 7); // 12 callPolyfill sets the "this" context to {"a": 5}. 7 is passed as an argument.
testcases.expectedOutput: 12 Explanation: fn.callPolyfill({"a": 5}, 7); // 12 callPolyfill sets the "this" context to {"a": 5}. 7 is passed as an argument.

testcases.input: fn = function tax(price, taxRate) {  return `The cost of the ${this.item} is ${price * taxRate}`; } args = [{"item": "burger"}, 10, 1.1] Output: "The cost of the burger is 11" Explanation: callPolyfill sets the "this" context to {"item": "burger"}. 10 and 1.1 are passed as additional arguments.
testcases.expectedOutput: "The cost of the burger is 11" Explanation: callPolyfill sets the "this" context to {"item": "burger"}. 10 and 1.1 are passed as additional arguments.
